title: Roe group
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Roe group''' was a group of three [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttles]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

They attempted to [[Skirmish at Outpost D-34|prevent]] the capture of ''[[Onece 3]]'' but were destroyed by forces of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces of [[Outpost D-34]].

==Ships==
*''[[Roe 1]]''
*''[[Roe 2]]''
*''[[Roe 3]]''
